data.content:
Tests ran only on `net9.0` using:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The `--framework` flag restricts the test run to the specified target framework. The build and test execution completed successfully on `net9.0` only (no `net8.0` run). Note: no tests were discovered — the project doesn't appear to contain any test methods yet.
